nasb.text: and did not find His body, they came, saying that they had also seen a vision of angels who said that He was alive.

esv.text: and when they did not find his body, they came back saying that they had even seen a vision of angels, who said that he was alive.

cnv.text: 卻找不到他的身體。她們回來說看見天使顯現，天使說他活了。

ccb.text: 发现耶稣的遗体不见了，回来说天使曾向她们显现并告诉她们耶稣已经复活了。

csbs.text: 却找不到他的遗体，回来还说她们看到了天使的异象，而天使说耶稣还活着。
